pi_items.source: Task instructions and verifier scripts explicitly require this path.
Task instructions and verifier scripts explicitly require this path.
Task instructions explicitly specify these dimensions for the base block (44x71x21), pocket (40x67x19), and separator rib (2x67x10).

privileged_info_summary: The task requires generating a CAD model from scratch in SolveSpace. The exact required output paths for the SolveSpace project (.slvs) and exported mesh (.stl) are explicitly detailed in the task description and verifier scripts. The expected dimensions for the model features perfectly match the geometric constraints provided in the task instructions.
